items.headline: Intel’s stock is climbing. Here’s why the company’s new chip launch is so significant.
items.summary: The company’s launch of enterprise-focused processors shows that it’s ready to ship high volumes of products made with its new chip technology, an analyst said.

items.headline: SpaceX could soon file for an IPO. Why EchoStar and other space stocks are rising.
items.summary: Elon Musk’s company could raise more than $75 billion, according to The Information. That would easily make for one of the biggest IPOs in history.

items.summary: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.
